title: Seva ya Enchanting Trims
description: A mod that adds an alternative way to get enchantments reliably and repeatably.
body:
Requires [filament](https://modrinth.com/mod/filament).

Tired of the enchanting tables randomness? Don't wanna place down a lectern 1 billion times to get access to a reliable ways to get enchants? 

Well what if you could get enchanting trims that you can duplicate, and they were all obtained through actually interacting with the game, not through mindless grinding.

This mod does that!

To see how to get each trim you can check the in-game advancements, the trims are split into 6 tiers and the items to duplicate them are harder to get the more valuable the enchantments are, for example you duplicate Mending Trims using netherite scrap but the trim for the Curse of Vanishing can be duplicated using Coal.

Don't like that? The materials are changed with tags, so you can make your own datapack to change ```seva_ya_trims:tier_0_trimming_material``` and such to change stuff easily.
